tinker.name: Image Effect
tinker.description: Apply artistic effects to images like sketch and pixel art

zh-CN.name: 图片效果
zh-CN.description: 为图片添加素描、像素画等艺术效果

apply_sketch.description: Apply a pencil sketch effect to an image end to end: load the file, set sketch parameters, and optionally save.

path.description: Absolute path to a PNG, JPG, JPEG, or WebP image

thickness.description: Line thickness from 1 to 10. Defaults to the current UI setting.

brightness.description: Brightness from 0 to 20. Defaults to the current UI setting.

detail.description: Detail from 0 to 50. Defaults to the current UI setting.

deepen.description: Deepen from 0 to 8. Defaults to the current UI setting.

overwriteOriginal.description: When true, save overwrites the original file. When false, outputPath is required.

outputPath.description: Absolute path to save the result when overwriteOriginal is false.

save.description: Whether to save after applying the effect. Defaults to true.

apply_pixelate.description: Apply a pixel art effect to an image end to end: load the file, set pixelate parameters, and optionally save.

path.description: Absolute path to a PNG, JPG, JPEG, or WebP image

pixelSize.description: Block size from 2 to 48. Defaults to the current UI setting.

paletteEnabled.description: Whether to apply a pixel palette. Defaults to the current UI setting.

palette.description: Pixel palette id when paletteEnabled is true.

outline.description: Whether to draw pixel outlines. Defaults to the current UI setting.

overwriteOriginal.description: When true, save overwrites the original file. When false, outputPath is required.

outputPath.description: Absolute path to save the result when overwriteOriginal is false.

save.description: Whether to save after applying the effect. Defaults to true.

apply_ascii.description: Apply an ASCII art effect to an image end to end: load the file, set ASCII parameters, and optionally save.

path.description: Absolute path to a PNG, JPG, JPEG, or WebP image

cellSize.description: Cell size from 4 to 24. Defaults to the current UI setting.

contrast.description: Contrast from 0 to 100. Defaults to the current UI setting.

invert.description: Whether to invert luminance. Defaults to the current UI setting.

charset.description: Character set. Defaults to the current UI setting.

overwriteOriginal.description: When true, save overwrites the original file. When false, outputPath is required.

outputPath.description: Absolute path to save the result when overwriteOriginal is false.

save.description: Whether to save after applying the effect. Defaults to true.
